blended.narrative: Powder King is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
